description:
## Scope

main.rs:858 (`dump_outcomes_pipeline` default filter) currently reads
`mt.reachable_specs.iter().map(|(fid, _)| *fid).collect()` to gate
which caller fns to show. Replace with:

```rust
let reachable_fids: HashSet<FnId> =
    mt.specs.keys().map(|(fid, _)| *fid).collect();
```

`mt` is already in scope at line 802. No new function call needed.

## Why independent of atom A

The field today is just `specs.keys().collect()` — projecting from
`mt.specs.keys()` is semantically identical and requires nothing new.
Decouples B's progress from A's; either can land first.

## Tests

- Golden test for the outcomes dump: byte-identical output across the
  fixture matrix.

## Acceptance

- `cargo build` clean.
- Outcomes dump byte-identical pre/post on all fixtures.
title: Dump outcomes filter projects from mt.specs.keys()
